question: What is the energy source of the massive orbital platform known as the 'Aegis Station'?

answers.ground_truth: The massive orbital platform known as the 'Aegis Station' draws its power from a captured and contained miniature black hole.
answers.original: The Aegis Station draws its power from a captured and contained miniature black hole.

ops.description: Pyralia orbits very close to K'tharr Prime and is volcanically active.<SEP>Pyralia orbits very close to K'tharr Prime within the K'tharr System.
Jormund orbits K'tharr Prime within the K'tharr System.<SEP>Jormund orbits K'tharr Prime within the K'tharr System.
The Gleepglorp originates from planet Xylar.
The family went to the beach on Saturday.
Terran 'Stone-Speaker' staffs are carved from Ancient-Heartwood.

entities.name: Aegis Station
entities.description: The Aegis Station is a large orbital platform positioned above the planet Xylos, dedicated to planetary defense and equipped with powerful energy shields.<SEP>Aegis Station is a large orbital platform positioned above the planet Xylos, dedicated to planetary defense and powered by a captured miniature black hole.

entities.name: Orbital Platforms
entities.description: Orbital platforms are structures positioned in orbit around planets, with the Aegis Station being one example dedicated to planetary defense.

entities.name: Hawking Radiation
entities.description: Hawking radiation is the method by which the Aegis Station draws power from the contained miniature black hole.<SEP>Hawking Radiation is the energy derived from a miniature black hole, used to power Aegis Station.

relations.description: The Aegis Station is positioned above the planet Xylos to provide planetary defense.<SEP>Aegis Station is positioned above the planet Xylos to provide planetary defense.

The Aegis Station utilizes Hawking radiation from the miniature black hole to meet its immense power requirements.<SEP>Aegis Station utilizes Hawking radiation from the miniature black hole for its power requirements.

The Aegis Station uses a miniature black hole as its primary power source, requiring containment fields to maintain stability.<SEP>Aegis Station draws its power from a captured and contained miniature black hole.
The Aegis Station serves as a primary defense point, distinguishing it from other orbital platforms that use different power methods.

The Aegis Station relies on containment fields to maintain the stability of the miniature black hole, which is its most critical task.<SEP>Aegis Station requires constant energy input to maintain the containment fields for the miniature black hole.
The Aegis Station houses a large crew responsible for its operation and maintenance.
The Aegis Station employs cutting-edge technology for containing black holes, distinguishing it from other orbital platforms.
Aegis Station serves as a primary defense point for the planet Xylos.
Aegis Station utilizes cutting-edge technology for containing and utilizing the power of a miniature black hole.

entities.name: Consciousness-Nodes
entities.description: 'Consciousness-Nodes' are used to anchor 'Thought-Cables' and maintain stable psychic connections, pulsing with regular mental rhythms.

entities.name: Petrified Sunlight
entities.description: Petrified sunlight is a component used in crafting Sunstone Amulets.

entities.name: Growth-Force
entities.description: Growth-Force is a power that can accelerate plant development and healing, making seeds sprout in seconds.

entities.name: Central-Hub
entities.description: The Central-Hub is a location that connects all major Astral cities.

entities.name: Glow-Geodes
entities.description: Glow-Geodes are geodes that are crushed to create the powder used in Lumin-Ink.
